description: Apply minor answer-choice wording cleanup to two existing live question records in place while preserving record IDs, pool states, reviews, and learner history.

options.A: A root-cause analysis, because any medication delay should be investigated only after a sentinel event.
options.B: A final policy implementation, because one positive station trial proves system-wide effectiveness.
options.C: A disciplinary audit, because medication timing is primarily an individual compliance issue.
options.D: A Plan-Do-Study-Act cycle using a small test of change before broader adoption.

updates.reason: Remove parenthetical acronym cue from the correct answer choice while keeping the full method name.
Remove because-style explanatory clauses from all answer choices so only the analysis type is shown.
